description_long: This object consists of two muffins placed side by side on a round, light gray plate. One muffin features a pink, piped frosting with a rough, textured appearance, while the other has a yellow, piped frosting topped with small dark bits, possibly chocolate or nuts. Both muffins are encased in green, ridged paper wrappers that are slightly translucent and show the muffin base within. The muffins have a domed top, with the frosting applied in a decorative, swirled pattern. The plate is smooth and flat, providing a neutral background that highlights the vibrant colors of the muffins. The overall presentation suggests a fresh, appetizing treat suitable for display in a bakery or café.
description: Two decorated muffins with pink and yellow piped frosting sit side by side on a round, light gray plate, each in a green paper wrapper.
description_view_0: A single muffin with pink frosting is centered on the plate, with its green wrapper and decorative topping clearly visible.
description_view_1: Both muffins are visible side by side; the left has pink frosting, the right has yellow frosting with dark bits on top.
description_view_2: The yellow-frosted muffin is in the foreground, with the pink-frosted muffin partially visible behind it, both on the plate.
description_view_3: Both muffins are visible from the opposite side, with the yellow-frosted muffin on the left and the pink-frosted muffin on the right.
attribute_placement_location: on a round light gray plate
